zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus於1381年之前出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林時，她的父親Robert III Stewart King of Scotland43歲，母親Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland30歲。她於1397年5月24日與George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1458年3月20日之後在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus于1381年之前出生在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林时，她的父亲Robert III Stewart King of Scotland43岁，母亲Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland30岁。她于1397年5月24日与George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1458年3月20日之后在英国苏格兰斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍，埋葬在英国苏格兰斯林史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus was born before 1381, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, was 43 and her mother, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, was 30. She married George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus on 24 May 1397, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 20 March 1458, in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus est née avant 1381, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus le 24 mai 1397, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 20 mars 1458, à Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus vor 1381 in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert III Stewart King of Scotland 43 und ihre Mutter Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland 30. Sie hat am 24. Mai 1397 in Scotland George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 20. März 1458 in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus è nata il prima del 1381 nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus il 24 maggio 1397, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 20 marzo 1458, nel Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angusが1381年以前にイギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで生まれた時，父Robert III Stewart King of Scotlandは43歳，母Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotlandは30歳であった。1397年5月24日にスコットランドでGeorge Douglas 1st Earl of Angusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1458年3月20日以後にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアストラスブランで死去し，イギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus(이)가 1381년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert III Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1397년 5월 24일 스컷랜드에서 George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 3월 20일 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 스트래스블랜에서 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus nasceu antes 1381, em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus em 24 de maio de 1397, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 20 de março de 1458, em Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus родилась перед 1381 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert III Stewart King of Scotland было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus 24 мая 1397 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 20 марта 1458 г. в местности стратблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess Mary Stewart Stewart Countess Angus nació antes de 1381, en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert III Stewart King of Scotland, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Annabella Drummond Queen of Scotland, tenía 30 años. Se casó con George Douglas 1st Earl of Angus el 24 de mayo de 1397, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 20 de marzo de 1458, en Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
